title: MarkEdit Extensions
description: Schema for ~/Library/Containers/app.cyan.markedit/Data/Documents/extensions.json. Tracks the extension registry source and the installed extensions.

installedExtension.description: An installed extension. Array position is the injection order.

id.description: Extension identifier; kebab-case. Matches the registry entry when installed from the registry. An id that does not resolve in the registry index marks an unofficial (URL-lane) install.

version.description: Installed semantic version, e.g. "1.2.0". May be absent for URL-lane or manual installs.

url.description: Source the file was downloaded from. Absent for files dropped into scripts/ manually.

sha256.description: Integrity hash of the downloaded file, pinned at install time.

enabled.description: Whether the extension is injected. Disabling skips injection without deleting the file. Default: true.

updateCheck.description: Per-extension override of registry.updateCheck. Set "never" to freeze this extension. Default: inherit registry.updateCheck.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

registry.url.description: URL of the registry index.json. Overridable; a CDN mirror can replace it. Default: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MarkEdit-app/extensions/main/index.json.

registry.updateCheck.description: How often to check the registry for updates. Default: weekly.

registry.updateStrategy.description: What to do when an update is available. Default: prompt.
